candidate_summary: Master-specialist hood-launch-retrieve relay for long-horizon LLM execution: master M packages launch context (hood), launches specialist eagle agent A_eagle (smaller LLM fine-tuned via M's signature trajectories) for K independent turns, retrieves output, validates+integrates; voice-imprint distillation ensures A_eagle obeys only master; persistent specialist accumulates experience replay across launches.

results.name: Structured Agent Distillation LLM Agents (2505.13820)
results.description: Span-level distillation of reasoning + action spans for agent distillation; preserves reasoning fidelity + action consistency.
keyword_matches: specialist agent (master-launch specialist-eagle independent K-turn retrieve)
results.rationale: Structured agent distillation preserving reasoning + action spans is functionally equivalent to voice-imprint distillation of master signature trajectories into the specialist. High semantic and functional overlap on the distillation core.

results.name: Structured Distillation Personalized Agent Memory (2603.13017)
results.description: 11x token reduction with retrieval preservation; per-user personalized memory distillation.
keyword_matches: personalized distillation (voice-imprint distillation master-only signature obedience)
results.rationale: Personalized agent memory distillation with retrieval preservation directly maps to the master-specific specialist with persistent replay buffer. Per-user personalization mirrors master-only voice-imprint.

results.name: Survey On-Policy Distillation LLMs (2604.00626)
results.description: Unified framework along feedback signal + teacher access + loss granularity dimensions for on-policy distillation.
results.rationale: Survey covering teacher-student distillation paradigms covers the master-to-specialist distillation channel but as a generic survey rather than the specific hood-launch relay form. Just at threshold.

results.name: On-Policy Distillation Thinking Machines
results.description: On-policy distillation matches RL reasoning performance at fraction of cost.
results.rationale: On-policy distillation captures the master-to-specialist distillation idea but lacks master-specific obedience, hood-launch relay, and persistent specialist replay components. Below threshold on both axes.

results.name: LEGOMem Modular Procedural Memory Multi-Agent LLM (2510.04851)
results.description: Orchestrator planning + next-agent-selection + subtask allocation; task agents execute subtasks.
keyword_matches: subtask allocation (hood-launch sub-task embedding deployment relay)
procedural memory (persistent specialist accumulated experience replay)
results.rationale: Orchestrator planning + next-agent-selection + subtask allocation is an exact functional twin of master M dispatching A_eagle on sub-tasks with persistent procedural memory. Strong multi-component overlap.

results.name: CHAP Context Handoff NDSS 2026
results.description: Agents work in shifts passing compressed session state for relay handoff.
keyword_matches: agent handoff/relay (hood-launch sub-task embedding deployment relay)
context shifts (master-launch specialist-eagle independent K-turn retrieve)
results.rationale: CHAP context handoff with shifts passing compressed state directly mirrors hood-launch-retrieve relay paradigm. Candidate explicitly acknowledges CHAP as closest prior art.

results.name: EAGLET Global Planner Long-Horizon (2510.05608)
results.description: Global planner training via consensus filtering + cold-start fine-tuning.
keyword_matches: planner training (master-launch specialist-eagle independent K-turn retrieve)
results.rationale: EAGLET trains global planner via consensus filtering — covers the master planner long-horizon training aspect but lacks master-specialist relay, voice-imprint distillation, and persistent replay. Candidate notes it as different.

results.name: Memory Autonomous LLM Agents Survey (2603.07670)
results.description: Survey of memory mechanisms + multi-session agentic tests + persistent recall.
keyword_matches: persistent recall (persistent specialist accumulated experience replay)
results.rationale: Memory survey covering multi-session persistent recall is functionally the persistent specialist accumulated replay component. Strong overlap on persistence axis though generic survey nature softens specificity.

decision_rationale: Six of eight results independently meet the hit threshold (kw>=2 or sem>=0.7 or func>=0.7). Results 1 (Structured Agent Distillation), 2 (Personalized Agent Memory Distillation), 5 (LEGOMem orchestrator+subtask), 6 (CHAP context handoff), and 8 (Memory Survey) collectively cover the candidate's three core components: master-specialist distillation, hood-launch sub-task relay, and persistent specialist replay. The recombination of (a) voice-imprint distillation, (b) hood-launch K-turn relay, and (c) persistent specialist replay is fully decomposed by prior art — candidate is not novel.
